Tip of the day
Attributes involving a percent symbol % are multiplicative (For Example: +10% Fine material finding gives 1.1/100).

Pine toolbox
(Eternal)
Quality:

Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A handy toolbox for carrying artisan tools, made from pine.

The Pine toolbox item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • Have 8% towards maximum Artisan level [47].

Attributes

Quality Attributes

Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.

Global +2.5% Bonus experience
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +0.25% No materials consumed
While doing Artisan skills.

Global +3% Bonus experience
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +0.5% No materials consumed
While doing Artisan skills.

Global +3.5% Bonus experience
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +0.75% No materials consumed
While doing Artisan skills.

Global +4% Bonus experience
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +1% No materials consumed
While doing Artisan skills.

Global +5% Bonus experience
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +4 Inventory space
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +1.5% No materials consumed
While doing Artisan skills.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Woodwork a pine toolbox

You reshape your pine planks to fit together into a box shape for tools. It will make the load a little lighter.

Use your carpentry skills to create a pine toolbox.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Woodwork a pine toolbox Carpentry lvl. 12 Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. 5x Pine plank 1x Pine toolbox

Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base

XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
